svg.title: Smart Data Migration Framework — architecture
svg.desc: Six-layer architecture: source extraction, validation engine, relationship resolver, bulk load engine, progress tracker, and rollback layer.

g.text: CSV / Excel · Legacy CRM · External REST API · Another Salesforce org
